appliedUpdates.description: Documented default hooks fixture quirk in .factory/library/user-testing.md so scrutiny/user-testing validators can interpret hooks dry-run output markers correctly.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align interactive verification guidance with mission AGENTS policy by explicitly allowing deterministic automated evidence + code-path verification when interactive automation is impractical, while still requiring manual checks when feasible.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Fix review for install-scoping-unsupported-combinations-policy observed mismatch between `.factory/skills/cli-refactor-worker/SKILL.md` manual-interactive requirement and mission `AGENTS.md` allowance for deterministic automated evidence.
